user_services.name: nginx
user_services.purpose: High-performance HTTP server, reverse proxy, and web server infrastructure.

security_auditing_access_control.purpose: Loads and configures kernel auditing rules at boot time.

security_auditing_access_control.name: auditd
security_auditing_access_control.purpose: Linux Auditing System daemon that logs security-related events.

security_auditing_access_control.name: fips-crypto-policy-overlay
security_auditing_access_control.purpose: Implements custom configuration overlays for systemic FIPS cryptographic compliance.

security_auditing_access_control.name: firewalld
security_auditing_access_control.purpose: Provides user-friendly, dynamic host-based firewall rule management.

security_auditing_access_control.name: pam_namespace
security_auditing_access_control.purpose: Establishes private user file tracking systems using PAM directory overrides.

security_auditing_access_control.name: polkit
security_auditing_access_control.purpose: Allows unprivileged system processes to securely execute root-level actions based on policy.

security_auditing_access_control.name: selinux-autorelabel-mark
security_auditing_access_control.purpose: Flags the operating system to perform an SELinux security sweep on next boot.

security_auditing_access_control.name: selinux-autorelabel
security_auditing_access_control.purpose: Restores security context tags across system paths according to SELinux rules.

security_auditing_access_control.name: setroubleshootd
security_auditing_access_control.purpose: Captures complex SELinux blocks and provides plain-text debugging advice.

security_auditing_access_control.name: sshd
security_auditing_access_control.purpose: Manages safe encrypted incoming remote server connection paths (SSH).

enterprise_management_redhat_integration.name: capsule
enterprise_management_redhat_integration.purpose: Manages localized application sandboxing or Red Hat Satellite proxy workflows.

enterprise_management_redhat_integration.name: insights-client-boot
enterprise_management_redhat_integration.purpose: Starts foundational Red Hat Insights client inventory tracking during boot.

enterprise_management_redhat_integration.name: insights-client-results
enterprise_management_redhat_integration.purpose: Compiles local system logging profiles for evaluation by Red Hat Insights.

enterprise_management_redhat_integration.name: insights-client
enterprise_management_redhat_integration.purpose: Transmits system metadata to Red Hat for predictive security analytics.

enterprise_management_redhat_integration.name: insights-register
enterprise_management_redhat_integration.purpose: Connects the local host system profile to Red Hat Insights tracking services.

enterprise_management_redhat_integration.name: insights-unregister
enterprise_management_redhat_integration.purpose: Cleans up local data when removing the system from Red Hat Insights.

enterprise_management_redhat_integration.name: insights-unregistered
enterprise_management_redhat_integration.purpose: Runs local validation parameters when the system lacks Insights enrollment.

enterprise_management_redhat_integration.name: rhc-canonical-facts
enterprise_management_redhat_integration.purpose: Reports server inventory data profiles up to Red Hat Connect systems.

enterprise_management_redhat_integration.name: rhcd-stop
enterprise_management_redhat_integration.purpose: Terminates active Red Hat Connect utility operations during system shutdown.

enterprise_management_redhat_integration.name: rhsmcertd
enterprise_management_redhat_integration.purpose: Refreshes entitlement keys and local Red Hat Subscription validation profiles.

enterprise_management_redhat_integration.name: sssd
enterprise_management_redhat_integration.purpose: Integrates local Linux system authentication with central corporate directories.

enterprise_management_redhat_integration.name: sssd-autofs
enterprise_management_redhat_integration.purpose: Integrates user directory lookups with network directory file automounts.

enterprise_management_redhat_integration.name: sssd-kcm
enterprise_management_redhat_integration.purpose: Implements a safe shared storage repository tracking user Kerberos ticket caches.

enterprise_management_redhat_integration.name: sssd-nss
enterprise_management_redhat_integration.purpose: Overrides local user databases with network-based credential mappings.

enterprise_management_redhat_integration.name: sssd-pac
enterprise_management_redhat_integration.purpose: Evaluates specific Active Directory security tokens for access verification.

enterprise_management_redhat_integration.name: sssd-pam
enterprise_management_redhat_integration.purpose: Bridges authentication validation calls into external LDAP or Active Directory systems.

enterprise_management_redhat_integration.name: sssd-ssh
enterprise_management_redhat_integration.purpose: Serves verified user public keys directly from enterprise network directories.

enterprise_management_redhat_integration.name: sssd-sudo
enterprise_management_redhat_integration.purpose: References central enterprise servers to fetch and enforce user sudo rules.

enterprise_management_redhat_integration.name: yggdrasil-bus
enterprise_management_redhat_integration.purpose: Manages internal communication channels for Red Hat Connect system agents.

enterprise_management_redhat_integration.name: yggdrasil
enterprise_management_redhat_integration.purpose: The core worker daemon that executes remote tasks sent by Red Hat Connect.

cloud_initialization.name: cloud-config
cloud_initialization.purpose: Executes early-stage custom cloud instance configuration parameters.

cloud_initialization.name: cloud-final
cloud_initialization.purpose: Runs final-stage initialization tasks like user scripts inside cloud VMs.

cloud_initialization.name: cloud-init
cloud_initialization.purpose: Automates the complete provisioning and initialization of cloud servers.

cloud_initialization.name: cloud-init-hotplugd
cloud_initialization.purpose: Responds to dynamic network or storage hotplug events during cloud boot.

cloud_initialization.name: cloud-init-local
cloud_initialization.purpose: Searches for available cloud metadata datasources early in the boot flow.

network_management.name: NetworkManager
network_management.purpose: The core utility governing system network configurations and hardware connections.

network_management.name: NetworkManager-dispatcher
network_management.purpose: Executes custom integration scripts when network interface connection states shift.

network_management.name: NetworkManager-wait-online
network_management.purpose: Blocks downstream boot operations until a reliable network connection is established.

network_management.name: nm-cloud-setup
network_management.purpose: Automatically applies custom vendor network adjustments on cloud-hosted systems.

network_management.name: nm-priv-helper
network_management.purpose: Provides high-privilege system tasks on behalf of NetworkManager actions.

storage_disk_volume_management.name: dm-event
storage_disk_volume_management.purpose: Monitors Device Mapper frameworks (like LVM and RAID) for storage events.

storage_disk_volume_management.name: fstrim
storage_disk_volume_management.purpose: Discards unused blocks on solid-state drives (SSDs) to sustain performance.

storage_disk_volume_management.name: iscsi
storage_disk_volume_management.purpose: Manages network-attached block storage devices through iSCSI connections.

storage_disk_volume_management.name: iscsi-onboot
storage_disk_volume_management.purpose: Mounts networked iSCSI targets automatically when the host initiates.

storage_disk_volume_management.name: iscsi-shutdown
storage_disk_volume_management.purpose: Safely severs networked iSCSI block devices during system shutdowns.

storage_disk_volume_management.name: iscsi-starter
storage_disk_volume_management.purpose: Automatically activates required iSCSI helper utilities when configurations require them.

storage_disk_volume_management.name: lvm2-lvmpolld
storage_disk_volume_management.purpose: Tracks long-running background tasks involving Logical Volume Management (LVM).

storage_disk_volume_management.name: lvm2-monitor
storage_disk_volume_management.purpose: Actively watches LVM structures for volume faults or snapshot status changes.

storage_disk_volume_management.name: mdadm-grow-continue
storage_disk_volume_management.purpose: Restarts interrupted software RAID volume resizing operations.

storage_disk_volume_management.name: mdadm-last-resort
storage_disk_volume_management.purpose: Attempts to force-mount damaged software RAID spaces to protect vulnerable data.

storage_disk_volume_management.name: mdcheck_continue
storage_disk_volume_management.purpose: Resumes a previously paused software RAID data integrity check.

storage_disk_volume_management.name: mdcheck_start
storage_disk_volume_management.purpose: Launches a scheduled health check across software RAID arrays.

storage_disk_volume_management.name: mdmon
storage_disk_volume_management.purpose: Monitors software RAID structures that depend on external system metadata formats.

storage_disk_volume_management.name: mdmonitor
storage_disk_volume_management.purpose: Runs persistent background checks to alert administrators of software RAID volume failures.

storage_disk_volume_management.name: mdmonitor-oneshot
storage_disk_volume_management.purpose: Performs a single quick health scan across active software RAID modules.

storage_disk_volume_management.name: multipathd
storage_disk_volume_management.purpose: Controls multiple physical storage link tracks to protect against interface errors.

storage_disk_volume_management.name: quotaon
storage_disk_volume_management.purpose: Enforces configured maximum storage limits for system users and groups.

storage_disk_volume_management.name: quotaon-root
storage_disk_volume_management.purpose: Toggles file storage constraint enforcements specifically across the root partition.

storage_disk_volume_management.name: raid-check
storage_disk_volume_management.purpose: Runs routine verification sweeps over software RAID setups to prevent data rot.

storage_disk_volume_management.name: udisks2
storage_disk_volume_management.purpose: Exposes operational API boundaries to partition and manage attached storage blocks.

system_maintenance_logging_automation.name: chronyd
system_maintenance_logging_automation.purpose: Synchronizes the system clock with NTP time servers.

system_maintenance_logging_automation.name: crond
system_maintenance_logging_automation.purpose: Schedules and automatically runs background time-based automation scripts.

system_maintenance_logging_automation.name: dnf-makecache
system_maintenance_logging_automation.purpose: Regularly updates package repository metadata caches in the background.

system_maintenance_logging_automation.name: dnf-system-upgrade-cleanup
system_maintenance_logging_automation.purpose: Purges residual setup caches after a major system version upgrade.

system_maintenance_logging_automation.name: fwupd
system_maintenance_logging_automation.purpose: System daemon enabling local system and component firmware modifications.

system_maintenance_logging_automation.name: fwupd-offline-update
system_maintenance_logging_automation.purpose: Installs scheduled hardware and component firmware updates during a system reboot.

system_maintenance_logging_automation.name: fwupd-refresh
system_maintenance_logging_automation.purpose: Checks remote channels for newly available hardware firmware updates.

system_maintenance_logging_automation.name: logrotate
system_maintenance_logging_automation.purpose: Automatically rotates, compresses, and cleans up growing system log files.

system_maintenance_logging_automation.name: man-db-cache-update
system_maintenance_logging_automation.purpose: Rebuilds index references for system software manuals (man pages).

system_maintenance_logging_automation.name: packagekit
system_maintenance_logging_automation.purpose: Offers a unified management framework for software package tools.

system_maintenance_logging_automation.name: packagekit-offline-update
system_maintenance_logging_automation.purpose: Applies system updates safely within an offline system boot wrapper.

system_maintenance_logging_automation.name: rsyslog
system_maintenance_logging_automation.purpose: Gathers, modifies, and pipes systemic system logging events across servers.

system_maintenance_logging_automation.name: system-update-cleanup
system_maintenance_logging_automation.purpose: Cleans up leftover installer cache modules when system updates conclude.

system_maintenance_logging_automation.name: tuned
system_maintenance_logging_automation.purpose: Optimizes system resource parameters dynamically via selected performance profiles.
